---
description: |
  Re-assigns an agent-generated pull request to GitHub Copilot cloud agent when
  a maintainer comments /agent-fix.

on:
  slash_command:
    name: agent-fix
    strategy: centralized
  reaction: "eyes"

permissions:
  contents: read
  issues: read
  pull-requests: read
  actions: read
  copilot-requests: write

engine:
  id: copilot
  model: gpt-4o-mini
network: defaults

tools:
  github:
    toolsets: [issues, pull_requests, repos]
    min-integrity: none

safe-outputs:
  assign-to-agent:
    name: "copilot"
    allowed: [copilot]
    max: 1
    target: "triggering"
    target-repo: "ArnavGupta262/CenEMSAgentTesting"
    pull-request-repo: "ArnavGupta262/CenEMSAgentTesting"
    base-branch: "main"
    custom-instructions: |
      Address the actionable review feedback on the triggering pull request.
      Follow AGENTS.md. Limit code changes to src/** and tests/**. Add or update
      tests when needed, run python -m unittest discover, and update the pull
      request with a focused fix. Summarize which review comments were addressed.
    github-token: ${{ secrets.GH_AW_AGENT_TOKEN }}
  add-comment:
    max: 1
    footer: false

imports:
  - shared/slack-notify.md

timeout-minutes: 12
---

# CenEMS Copilot Feedback Assignment Agent

You are assigning an existing pull request back to Copilot cloud agent after a
maintainer requested `/agent-fix`.

## Guardrails

- Only act on pull requests generated by the agent pilot or authored by Copilot.
- Do not modify repository files yourself.
- Use `assign-to-agent` for the triggering pull request.
- Use `add-comment` to record that Copilot cloud agent was assigned to address
  review feedback, or explain why assignment was unsafe.
- Call `slack-notify` with a short message including the PR URL.

## Steps

1. Read the triggering pull request, reviews, review comments, and recent PR
   comments.
2. Confirm there is actionable feedback to address.
3. Use `assign-to-agent` for the triggering pull request.
4. Use `add-comment` with a concise status update for maintainers.
5. Call `slack-notify` saying the PR feedback was delegated to Copilot cloud
   agent.
